parity_pinned_by_test: internal/complete/panel_gate_e2e_test.go:TestPanelGate_SharedDecisionPin — reconstructs panel.GateFacts via panel.ResolveGateFacts with the same scanRoot (panel.PanelDirScanRoot) and bead/<id> rev-parse the gate uses, then asserts the gate's guard.NewFailure body has prefix == strings.TrimRight(PanelGateDecision(facts).Message). It genuinely pins equivalence (Block action + verbatim body). Reinforced by TestPanelGate_Freshness_PassAndStaleBlock (HEAD source == rev-parse(bead/<id>)) and the relocated panel.TestPanelGateDecision matrix.
summary: R3 extraction is behaviorally faithful and R5 block parity holds by construction. (1) Leaf invariant: `go list -deps ./internal/panel | grep mrmaxsteel` yields ONLY internal/panel itself — every other internal/* is Go stdlib (internal/poll, internal/godebug, ...). No internal/workspace/gitutil/next leaked; bead-branch prefix is inlined as the "bead/" literal and ADR-0025 artifact filtering is locally copied per the documented leaf seam. (2) Decision parity: BOTH call sites compute the block message from the SAME panel.PanelGateDecision over panel.GateFacts from the SAME panel.ResolveGateFacts + GateIO seam. The hook (runPreComplete) builds ZERO messages of its own — the only Message assignment in precomplete.go is line 537 `Message: d.Message` (verbatim copy via toResult); no fmt.Sprintf/RawMergeFence anywhere in the hook. The in-binary panelGate likewise calls PanelGateDecision and surfaces d.Message, only appending a genuine recovery line via the guard arg (fence stays in the body). TestPanelGate_SharedDecisionPin PASSES and asserts byte-prefix equality. (3) Mapping fidelity: toResult maps panel.Block→hook.Block (exit-2 path unchanged), panel.Warn→Warn, panel.Allow→Pass; the in-binary maps panel.Block→guard.NewFailure (returned BEFORE any mutation, pre-CommitAll, HC-4). Gate wired at complete.Run step 2.25 BEFORE CommitAll/bd-close/merge — ordering documented as load-bearing (CommitAll would advance the tip past reviewed_head_sha / clear dirt). (4) No drift in the retained heuristic matcher: strippedCompleteFields / completeBeadID / segmentInvokesComplete are untouched per R4 and remain the defense-in-depth backstop; ADR-0037 AMENDMENT NOTE documents the deferred retirement. Ran: `go test -run 'SharedDecision|Parity' ./internal/complete/ ./internal/hook/` (PASS), `go test -run TestPanelGateDecision ./internal/panel/` (PASS), `go test -run TestRunPreComplete ./internal/hook/` (PASS). Did NOT run ./internal/harness/... per the constraint.
